contributor: university of illinois at urbana-champaign library, urbana, il
description: Speed the Signature Collection Campaign for the Unemployment Insurance Bill Unemployment Insurance Must Be Won Now Yol VII No 282 Lovers of Freedom THE Hotel Pennsylvania is one of New Yorks nicest It is a fitting place for the gathering that took place there Sunday of what the N Y Times called socialist labor and Russian groups to adopt a resolution calling on all lovers of freedom to protest the rule of blood and to raise money for relief of the heroic victims of the reign of terror in the Soviet Union Firstly just who are these people Here there were socialists who by even the capitalists who support them are known to have nothing in common with genuine socialist principles socialists who openly pledge their support to the bosses against the workers socialists who deny that there exists any fundamental difference in interest any mutual conflict any inevitable struggle between the working class and the capitalist class Here too there were those labor groups carried around in the vest pocket of Matthew Woll who can add up supporters by the hundred thousand but who cannot get a bakers dozen of them to a really public mass meeting In fact
partof: the daily worker (chicago, ill.;new york, n.y.) 1924-1958
